title: egenolfia intermedia
intro: Egenolfia intermedia, also known as Water Germander or Water Eyes, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to act as a natural expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. The plant is rich in essential oils and flavonoids, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Egenolfia intermedia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
